fresh_facts.claim: The Pentagon announced plans to deploy an additional 3,000 troops to the Middle East, building on 50,000 already stationed there.
US airstrikes that began February 28, 2026 have destroyed over 9,000 Iranian targets including missile launchers, navy assets, and defense infrastructure.
2,500 Marines are deploying with warships including USS Boxer and its Marine Expeditionary Unit for potential operations in the Strait of Hormuz.
Up to 1,500 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are preparing to deploy, announced March 24, 2026.
Iran launched drone and ballistic missile attacks on Israel and regional targets on March 24, 2026.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei died on February 28, 2026 from an airstrike.
Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the former Supreme Leader, was contested installation on March 9, 2026.
Mohammad Bagher Zolqadr replaced Ali Larijani as secretary of the Supreme National Security Council on March 24, 2026.
Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf stated on March 24, 2026 that no direct US negotiations occurred.
US President Trump announced on March 24, 2026 that 'major points of agreement' were reached from recent contacts and postponed strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure for five days.
Pakistan offered to host talks on March 24, 2026, with Oman and China pressing for diplomacy amid ongoing Iranian missile fire.
Lebanon revoked approval for Iran's ambassador-designate Mohammad Reza Sheybani on March 24, 2026, declaring him persona non grata with expulsion by March 29.
Lebanon recalled its own ambassador amid Israeli military escalation in southern Lebanon, including a planned 'security zone' to the Litani River.
IAEA chief Rafael Grossi insisted on March 24, 2026 that Iran's religious prohibition on nuclear weapons must be verifiable.
Israel continued strikes including in Tehran and Tabriz on March 24, 2026, killing six people in the Moftah area and IRGC commander Hamid Mirzadeh.
Massive uprisings in December 2025 through January 2026 resulted in thousands of protesters being massacred according to opposition sources.
The Iranian regime conducted over 2,600 executions and arrested tens of thousands during 2025-2026 according to opposition accounts.
Oil prices reached $108 per barrel amid Strait of Hormuz tensions and Iranian threats to block access.
Iranian officials are blocking Strait of Hormuz access, causing global oil disruptions.
NCRI sources describe unprecedented fear of organized Resistance (PMOI/NLA) and mass defections within suppressive ranks.

regime_fall.current_status: Intensive US-Israeli military campaign with 53,000 total deployed troops and 9,000+ Iranian targets destroyed continues alongside contradictory diplomatic signals, while Iran responds with missile attacks and the nascent Mojtaba regime attempts internal power consolidation amid succession instability and reports of mass defections.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran launched drone and ballistic missile attacks on Israel and regional targets on March 24, 2026, while simultaneously facing contested diplomatic overtures from Trump administration claiming agreement on major points and a five-day strike postponement.
